name: Google
about: Google's hiring process is known for being rigorous, focusing on Data Structures, Algorithms, and Googleyness.

roles.description: Targeting university graduates and students for Software Engineer (University Graduate) with a focus on problem-solving, innovation, and technical excellence.

rounds.name: Resume Screening
rounds.instructions: AI Resume Match evaluates your skills, projects, and ATS score. You need a high match to proceed.

rounds.name: Online Assessment
rounds.instructions: Usually 2 coding problems. Features Fullscreen Mode, Auto Save, Tab Switch Detection.

rounds.name: Technical Interview 1
rounds.instructions: Interactive coding interview in Whiteboard/Editor mode. You must think aloud, write code, optimize, and discuss edge cases.

rounds.name: Technical Interview 2
rounds.instructions: Deep dive into more complex algorithmic concepts or system design depending on the role.

rounds.name: Technical Interview 3
rounds.instructions: Final technical round testing domain expertise and highly scalable problem solving.

rounds.name: Googleyness Interview
rounds.instructions: Behavioral simulation. AI interviewer asks follow-up questions naturally on teamwork, handling failure, and ambiguity.

rounds.name: Hiring Committee Review
rounds.instructions: Committee reviews Resume, Coding Performance, Interview Ratings, and Behavior to make a final recommendation.

rounds.name: Offer Decision
rounds.instructions: Final hiring report with overall performance, strengths, weaknesses, and expected readiness.
